title: Order Type
description:
Specifies the classification of the order based on its nature, purpose, or contractual arrangement.
This helps identify whether the order involves a new purchase, renewal, upgrade, transfer, suspension,
migration, evaluation, or any other business scenario. Each value represents a predefined business process
or transaction type that impacts how the order is handled and processed.
For a complete list of supported values, refer to the `enum` section.

x-enumDescriptions.New: A fresh order that does not involve any migration, renewal, or upgrade.
x-enumDescriptions.Migration - Standard: A standard migration from another platform.
x-enumDescriptions.Evaluation License: License issued temporarily for evaluation purposes.
x-enumDescriptions.Stop - Transform: Discontinuing an existing license with a shift to a transformed model or product.
x-enumDescriptions.Suspension: Temporarily halting the license or support services.
x-enumDescriptions.Termination Of Support: Ending the support of a product or service.
x-enumDescriptions.Change of Channel: Changing Final Customer coverage from direct to indirect or vice versa.
x-enumDescriptions.Change of VAR: Changing the Value-Added Reseller (VAR) for an existing order.
x-enumDescriptions.DS Brand -> DS & Migration: Migrating from DS Brand to DS with migration services.
x-enumDescriptions.DS Brand -> DS OTC Platform: Transitioning from DS Brand to DS OTC Platform.
x-enumDescriptions.EPP Training: Training related to EPP (Enterprise Productivity Portfolio).
x-enumDescriptions.IBM -> DS & Migration: Transitioning from IBM to DS with migration services.
x-enumDescriptions.IBM -> DS without Support: Transitioning from IBM to DS without support.
x-enumDescriptions.IBM NAL Parallel Use -> DS: Parallel use of IBM NAL with DS.
x-enumDescriptions.IBM NAL without Support -> DS: Transitioning from IBM NAL to DS without support.
x-enumDescriptions.One Time Fee: Fee charged for a one-time service or transaction.
x-enumDescriptions.Special Order: New licenses with specific administrative requests.
x-enumDescriptions.Stop & Parallel Use: Discontinuing an existing license with parallel use.
x-enumDescriptions.Suspension Reinstatement: Reinstating a suspended license or support services.
